rules.title: Texas Business & Commerce Code Chapter 509 - Use of Digital Services by Minors
rules.scope_note: Applies only within the scope of Texas law; not nationwide federal law. Current enforceability may be affected by litigation or injunctions and must be checked before legal use.
rules.source_authority: Texas Constitution and Statutes official page, archived by Internet Archive
rules.status_note: Official Texas Constitution and Statutes live codified source and Texas Legislative Reference Library sources returned maintenance HTTP 503 responses on 2026-05-25 with Retry-After Tue, 26 May 2026 12:00:00 GMT. This file is generated from the 2025-09-01 Internet Archive snapshot of the official BC.509.v2.htm page. The archived source itself notes that Sections 509.001 and 509.002 were amended by the 89th Legislature pending publication of current statutes; verify the live official source when maintenance ends before legal use.
